title: An Act Regarding Changes of Ownership of Dams
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 20, 2025
last_house_action: 4/17/2025 - Committee on Environment and Natural Resources suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/20/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
